channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: President Samia to Participate in Africa Nuclear Energy Summit in Rwanda
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan of Tanzania is set to travel to Kigali, Rwanda today to take part in the Nuclear Energy Innovation Summit for Africa 2026 (NEISA 2026). The summit will gather leaders fro...

item.title: NCAA Implements Health Measures at Airports Amid Ebola Outbreak in DRC and Uganda
item.description: The Nigeria Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) don issue new directives to all airlines wey dey operate for Naija, both domestic and international, make dem dey sharply monitor passengers and enhance hea...

item.title: Australia faces concerning diphtheria outbreak linked to declining vaccination rates and overcrowded housing
item.description: Australia is experiencing its most significant diphtheria outbreak in decades, with cases spreading from the Northern Territory to Western Australia, Queensland, and South Australia. Health authoritie...

item.title: RCMP Investigates Death of Brampton Teen Found in Saskatchewan
item.description: The remains of 16-year-old Jay’siiah Webb-Long, a teen from Brampton, Ontario, were discovered on May 13, 2026, near Pelican Narrows, Saskatchewan, during a planned search conducted by the Saskatchewa...

item.title: WHO expresses concern over rapid spread of Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has voiced serious concerns regarding the scale and speed of an Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). As of the latest reports, the outbreak has...

item.title: John Swinney secures reappointment as Scotland’s First Minister after parliamentary vote
item.description: John Swinney has been re-appointed as Scotland’s First Minister following a vote in the Scottish Parliament, confirming his continued leadership of the Scottish National Party (SNP) government. His no...

item.title: Mastercard and Yellow Card partner to expand stablecoin-based remittance services in Nigeria
item.description: Mastercard and Yellow Card don enter strategic partnership to tap into Nigeria’s estimated $20 billion remittance market by using stablecoin-powered payment solutions. The collaboration go focus on ma...

item.title: Reflections on what makes a place feel like home
item.description: The article explores the essence of what makes a place feel like home, sparked by the story of a cat that moved along with its family to a temporary residence, showing that home is defined more by the...

item.title: US Law Requires Platforms to Remove Nonconsensual Intimate Images
item.description: Starting May 19, 2026, U.S. tech platforms are legally required to provide mechanisms for reporting and removing nonconsensual intimate images (NCII), thanks to the Take It Down Act. This law, support...

item.title: Historic Photograph Likely Shows Black Union Soldier and His Family During the Civil War
item.description: This rare and historically significant photograph, dating from around 1864, captures an African American Union soldier alongside his wife and two daughters. The image, a quarter-plate ambrotype, is wi...

item.title: Top Line triples fuel storage in Cebu to strengthen Visayas supply chain
item.description: Top Line Business Development Corporation, the company behind Light Fuels stations in the Visayas, is set to significantly increase its fuel storage capacity by leasing storage facilities from LuDo & ...

item.title: Charlize Theron’s 1993 Tribute to Marilyn Monroe in Madame Figaro
item.description: In 1993, Charlize Theron, at just 18 years old, took part in a memorable photo shoot for the French magazine Madame Figaro, where she posed as iconic Hollywood star Marilyn Monroe. At the time, Theron...

item.title: Andy Barr wins Republican Senate primary in Kentucky with Trump endorsement
item.description: Rep. Andy Barr, a seven-term Republican congressman from Kentucky, has emerged victorious in a crowded Republican primary for the U.S. Senate seat being vacated by retiring Sen. Mitch McConnell. Barr’...

item.title: Church Members Celebrate Men’s Day With Football To Promote Fitness
item.description: The presiding elder of The Ascension Apostolic Church Elekahia Assembly, Saroh Jacob, don yan say make person dey fit and active na important part of daily life. He yan this one shortly after one nove...

item.title: U.S. Official Allegedly Facilitated Visa for Polish Minister Facing Criminal Charges
item.description: A new report alleges that a U.S. official assisted Polish Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro in fleeing prosecution. Ziobro, a member of Poland's right-wing Law and Justice Party, faces over two dozen c...

item.title: B.C. Premier Eby urges equal federal support for B.C. projects amid pipeline discussions
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby has voiced concern that the federal government is giving disproportionate attention to Alberta, particularly regarding the West Coast bitumen pipeline project. Eby h...

item.title: ANC restructures Gauteng and Eastern Cape leadership ahead of local elections
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has taken decisive steps to stabilise its internal structures in Gauteng and the Eastern Cape ahead of the upcoming local government elections. The party’s National...

item.title: Australia’s Private Prisons: Ongoing Debate Over Safety, Costs, and Accountability
item.description: The South Australian government recently extended a contract with Serco to manage the Adelaide Remand Centre for another five years, despite a critical report highlighting operational failures. The Mc...

item.title: Cross River APC Lawmakers Allege Irregularities in House of Representatives Primaries
item.description: Some sitting members of the House of Representatives from Cross River State wey dey run for reelection don yan serious wahala with the APC primary wey happen last Saturday. Hon. Emily Inyang and Hon. ...

item.title: Government Regulation Will Determine the Impact of the NextEra-Dominion Merger
item.description: NextEra Energy has announced plans to acquire Dominion Energy, which would result in the creation of the world's largest utility company by market capitalization. While the scale of this merger is his...
